title: Real-learner cohort completes a course; misconception reduction recorded (the closed loop)
context: The project's Definition of Shipped requires that a real cohort of learners completes a course and demonstrates a measurable reduction in the targeted statistical misconceptions, with outcomes recorded with the delivery partner's attestation. This task represents the closed-loop measurement that constitutes the deed. The pre/post instrument (oncology-data-literacy-assessment-016) is administered by the delivery partner to real learners; the eval harness (oncology-data-literacy-eval-017) scores the results. The 'not medical advice' frame must be upheld throughout delivery. No partner is yet secured.
objective: Coordinate with the secured delivery partner to deliver a course to a real learner cohort, administer the pre/post misconception instrument, and record the measured reduction in targeted misconceptions (per-item delta and aggregate) with the partner's attestation. Confirm the 'not medical advice' frame was upheld throughout delivery. Record outcomes as the success object: misconception reduction, not page views.
acceptanceCriteria: A real learner cohort completes at least one full course (Reading Rates, Reading Survival, or Reading Screening Evidence) under the secured delivery partner
The pre/post misconception instrument is administered to the cohort; results are recorded anonymously (no PII) with the partner's attestation
The eval harness (oncology-data-literacy-eval-017) scores the pre-to-post misconception reduction; the per-item delta is recorded for the core misconception items

Outcomes show a statistically meaningful or observable reduction in at least the core misconception items (e.g., survival-rise implies benefit, base-rate item); if no movement is detected, content is flagged for rework per the M5 kill-gate
'Not medical advice' frame was upheld throughout delivery; partner attests no individualized advice or screening recommendation was implied
Outcomes are recorded as the project's success object: cohort size, per-item misconception reduction, and partner attestation — not page views or module completions alone
Oncologist attestation that HIGH-tier framing was maintained in any survival or screening modules delivered
output: A delivery outcomes report: cohort size, per-item pre/post misconception reduction recorded with partner attestation, 'not medical advice' compliance confirmed — the closed-loop measurement that constitutes the project's Definition of Shipped.
